name: Social Latitude - Playground and Pub
about: Social Latitude is an entertainment venue in Greenville that combines golf and sports simulators with a full-service pub and arcade. The facility features Full Swing Golf Simulators for a realistic virtual golf experience alongside other sports simulations and activities like axe throwing. It operates as a social destination where patrons can enjoy food, drinks, and competitive gaming. Pricing is based on individual experiences, with special deals on Tuesdays and Wedningsdays offering half-price games. The venue caters to a diverse clientele, from casual players to those celebrating events like birthdays and corporate outings.
why_golfers_like_it: Half-price game days on Tuesdays and Wednesdays
Social atmosphere with a full bar and restaurant
Multiple entertainment options in one location
Available for private events and parties

food_and_drink.notes: Full restaurant menu available with flatbreads and other items. Takeout option also offered.
Full bar service available, serving beer and cocktails.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium golf simulator hardware used for virtual golf experiences

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides golf equipment, but patrons are welcome to bring their own clubs if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring in my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed as Social Latitude has a full-service restaurant and bar on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typical 18-hole rounds take approximately 60-90 minutes depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Social Latitude is kid-friendly until 9pm on Fridays and Saturdays, with specific party packages available for kids and teens.
